name: OpenClaw Mem
description: Capture observations + optional episodic events (including conversations) into JSONL for openclaw-mem ingestion

includeTools.description: If set, only capture these tools (allowlist)

excludeAgents.description: Optional agent ids to exclude from observation capture and episodic spool writes

captureMessage.description: Capture full tool message (truncated). Warning: can be large.

redactSensitive.description: Redact common secret patterns from summaries/messages before persisting. Recommended true.

maxMessageLength.description: Max message length per content block when captureMessage=true

backendMode.description: Adapter backend mode for memory metadata annotation. auto = follow plugins.slots.memory

annotateMemoryTools.description: Annotate captured rows with memory backend/tool metadata in detail_json

memoryToolNames.description: Tool names treated as memory actions for adapter annotation

episodes.description: Optional episodic auto-mode spool (conversation/tool/ops events; summary-first, redaction-on)
